name: Reflection
description: While you sleep, Möbius reviews the day's work and leaves a one-page morning brief.
author: mobius-os

offline.reads_detail: The reports list, each opened brief body, and the streak/state are read through window.mobius.storage (list/getText/get), so they render offline from the runtime read-through cache. A brief opens offline after it has been opened once online (its body is mirrored on that read).
